description: Response shape for GET /v1/census/runs/{run_id}. Intentionally omits requested_by (internal username) per #727. The result field carries a CensusRunResult (contracts.census_run_result) — the RepoCensus.model_dump() artifact. Crosses the API boundary (ADR-056 D7 criterion 6). Authority: ADR-056 Wave 3 (#366). Source: src/api/v1/schemas.py, class CensusRunResponse.

snapshot.description: Whether this run was requested with snapshot=true (persists the census to disk history).

baseline_name.description: Named baseline this run was compared against, if any. Null for snapshot-only runs.

requested_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the run was requested.

started_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when execution began.

finished_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when execution completed.

result.description: CensusRunResult JSONB payload (contracts.census_run_result) — the RepoCensus.model_dump() artifact plus optional snapshot_file key. Null while pending|executing.

error.description: Error message if status=failed. Null on success.
